\tzpentry{ID3546}{Spectral Gap Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3546 introduces Spectral Gap Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Delta E \sim \mathcal{P}\!\!\int \frac{|g(k)|^2}{E_i-E_k}\,dk,\qquad \gamma \sim 2\pi |g(\omega_{if})|^2. \]
